# Harness Kit generated docs context

Generated by scripts/build-docs-site.py; do not edit manually.
Copy source: docs/copy/site.json

Harness Kit is an operator-facing harness primitive library for AI-assisted software development.
It is not an enterprise admin-control plane or procurement-ready client package.

Core pages:
- Start: docs/site/index.html
- Concepts: docs/site/concepts.html
- Workflows: docs/site/workflows.html
- Governance: docs/site/governance.html
- Reference: docs/site/reference/index.html

Onboarding path:
- Install: ./bootstrap.sh
- First workflow: /shape -> /deliver -> /ci + /qa -> /reflect
- Use the Start page chooser to map jobs to primitives.

Primitives:
- skill:a11y | skills/a11y/SKILL.md | docs/site/reference/skills/a11y.html

- check-agent-roster
- check-deliver-composition
- check-docs-site
- check-evidence-blocks
- check-exclusions

- check-index-drift
